title: CCI Craftable Creative Items
description: This data pack gives players the ability to collect items only available in Creative Mode.
body:
# Short Description
This Datapack/mod adds various new recypes for items which can only be optained in creative mode or cant be crafted.
1.You can now craft command blocks such as bedrock and barrier blocks
2.some in survival obtainable uncraftable items also got a recype like the elytra ,trident ant the totem of undying

Recypes for spawn eggs will be added withthe next big update

I made this mod/datapack because i wanted to make building farms easier and more fun by adding recypes for nearly all uncraftable items

##  Features
- Craftable Command Blocks
- Craftable Bedrock
- Craftable Budding Amethist
- Craftable Elytra
- Craftable Trident
- Craftable Light
- Craftable Spawner
- Craftable Vault
- Craftable Trial Spawner
- Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple
  
And much more!

### How to Report bugs
Report bugs in my discord server

If i should upgrade or downgrade to a certain version, let me know in our Discord server!
